title: Illumina library construction for Extraction Method A, B, C (For FMS samples) and D, E (PRP and RM)

steps: End-repair step following Fortes & Paijmans 2015, with T4 Plynuclease kinase and T4 Polymerase, and heat inactivation of the enzymes (to remove column clean-up step). Fortes, G.G. & Paijmans, J.L.A. (2015) Analysis of whole mitogenomes from ancient samples. in Whole genome amplification, Humana Press, USA.

Ligation step following Fortes & Paijmans, 2015 with 0.5 µM of Illumina P5 and P7 adapter mix (20 µM each). Fortes, G.G. & Paijmans, J.L.A. (2015) Analysis of whole mitogenomes from ancient samples. in Whole genome amplification, Humana Press, USA.
Purify Adapter-ligated libraries with MinElute (Qiagen, Hilden, DE).
Elute libraries in 20 µL elution Buffer EB. undetermined, Buffer EB

Fill-in step of the adapters before library indexing, following Fortes & Paijmans, 2015. Fortes, G.G. & Paijmans, J.L.A. (2015) Analysis of whole mitogenomes from ancient samples. in Whole genome amplification, Humana Press, USA.

Perform indexing PCR reactions in a total volume of 15 µL with AmpliTaq Gold (Applied Biosystems) with Primer IS4 and individual Indexing Primers, following Fortes & Paijmans, 2015. The total number of cycles did not exceed 10 for the first round of amplification. Fortes, G.G. & Paijmans, J.L.A. (2015) Analysis of whole mitogenomes from ancient samples. in Whole genome amplification, Humana Press, USA.
Verify indexed libraries with Agilent Tapestation HS (Agilent) for fragment size estimation and molar concentrations.
Perform parallel amplifications for each sample, with corrected number of PCR cycles, in order to avoid over-amplification and increased read clonality.
Purify indexed libraries with MinElute (Qiagen, Hilden, DE).
Elute libraries in 20 µL elution Buffer EB. undetermined, Buffer EB
creator: Faezah Mohd Salleh
